name: cerbos-policy-author
description: Author, review, and test Cerbos authorization policies.

interface.shortDescription: Author, review, and test Cerbos authorization policies.
interface.longDescription: Help agents produce Cerbos policies with explicit principal/resource/action fixtures, allow-deny examples, and regression evals.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Cerbos plugin to plan the workflow, identify verification checks, and produce plugin eval metadata.
